description: NgrokProvider configures a store to sync secrets with a ngrok vault to use in traffic policies. See: https://ngrok.com/blog-post/secrets-for-traffic-policy

apiUrl.description: APIURL is the URL of the ngrok API.

auth.description: Auth configures how the ngrok provider authenticates with the ngrok API.

vault.description: Vault configures the ngrok vault to sync secrets with.
